_comment: Sample headless SERVER run configuration. Use this when the simulator should bind locally and replay data. By default, data is sent immediately without waiting for clients to connect. Set waitForClient=true if you need to wait for downstream consumers first.
_usage: Copy this file, adjust the values, then launch with config=/absolute/path/to/your-launch-config.json. CLI values override config-file values.

connection._comment: Server mode binds to a local address/port. Set waitForClient=true to wait for clients before advancing through the file.

headless._comment: Headless mode runs without creating the normal Electron UI.

output._comment: Optional files that help schedulers, CI jobs, or scripts track the run outcome.

streaming._comment: Replay one line per second, stop at the end of the configured range, and exit when done.
